chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-543 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1590/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 3432/15 4. For hearing of main case 19.02.2019 Mr. Nandan A. Kella advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the petitioner at the very outset does not press this petition which he has filed for appointment of the petitioner in education department on the basis of donation of plot and submits that the petitioner would apply in the upcoming process of appointments and if he qualifies on merits among the other candidates, his case may be considered with margin of preference on the basis of donation of plot in the light of judgment passed by the Honourable Supreme Court in the case of Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper etc (Civil Appeals Nos.19-K to 50-K of 2015) and HAMEEDULLAH and 9 others versus HEADMISTRESS, GOVERNMENT GIRLS SCHOOL, CHOKARA, DISTRICT KARAK and 5 others (1997 SCMR 855). In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith application listed at serial No.3. However, if the petitioner applies in the upcoming process of appointments and he qualifies the same on merits alongwith other candidates, the appointing authority may use his discretion in favour of the petitioner on the basis of his donation of plot. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
